title: Nay's Purpule
description: A 1.8.9 Purple bedwars/skywars/pvp pack that aims to "upgrade" vanilla textures
body:
Nay's Purpule is a texture pack made for 1.8.9 PVP gamemodes such as bedwars & skywars. (and also yes, the typo is done by choice)


It was made specifically to celebrate Nayxo's Channel for reaching 400 subs !


It is mainly based arround vanilla as usual, but is mainly purple as it's one of my favorite colors !


It also includes some references to my logo and such !


It also includes a fully custom sky and edited main items for these PVP gamemodes.


/!\ The Sky ONLY WORKS WITH Optifine, while you can use the pack without optifine, the sky as well as the soundpack wont work without it /!\


Here are some screenshots taken with the pack :


![Nay's Purpule #1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c9fddd3ad1932b5fe626e3ce3370c4844f1ac684.jpeg)

![Nay's Purpule #2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/66616a8a7800671746b10a0ba056b8c198f32a30.jpeg)

![Nay's Purpule #3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e74dcd71a3956815170fab00c6d7460191110a08.jpeg)


Sidenote : Feel free to join the discord if there is any issues with the Texture pack (Rendering Issues, Crashes, Textures not working properly, Sky glitches and/or not rendering...) It helps us greatly improve the work we do and provide the best for you all !
